articles.description: The Premier League title race is set to go to the wire. BBC Sport has spoken to former winners to find out how players deal with the pressure.
articles.title: Premier League title race: Chaser or chased? How to deal with pressure

articles.description: George Russell has had to be satisfied with proving himself against his team-mate, but he may now have a car with which he can challenge for the title.
articles.title: 'George Russell exuding quiet sense of confidence as he heads into what could be defining year'

articles.description: Manchester United are likely to look at signing a left winger this summer even though former head coach Ruben Amorim spent three windows getting rid of them.
articles.title: Why Manchester United are on the lookout for wingers, again

articles.description: Dave Rennie is appointed the new head coach of New Zealand, becoming the first person of Pasifika heritage to lead the side as they target a fourth World Cup triumph.
articles.title: Dave Rennie named first All Blacks coach of Pasifika heritage

articles.description: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot began the week by saying he found most Premier League games no longer a joy to watch - and had little to enjoy as he described defeat at Wolves as the "same old story".
articles.title: Wolves 2-1 Liverpool: 'Same old story' for Arne Slot as Wolves vow to 'keep fighting'

articles.description: US President Donald Trump says he does not care if Iran take part in this summer's 2026 World Cup.
articles.title: US President Donald Trump does not care if Iran play at 2026 World Cup

articles.description: Wales' Six Nations team announcement to face Ireland in Dublin on Friday followed by head coach Steve Tandy's media conference live.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: Tandy set to name Wales team to face Ireland in Dublin

articles.description: The new Formula 1 season is entering a new era with more drivers and all new rule changes.
articles.title: Formula 1 quiz: One question for all 22 drivers on the 2026 grid

articles.description: A "clear win" was what Sarina Wiegman wanted from her England side against Ukraine - and that was what they delivered in a bright start to their World Cup qualifying campaign.
articles.title: England beat Ukraine 6-1 to deliver 'clear win' that Sarina Wiegman demanded

articles.description: Los Angeles Lakers coach JJ Redick says he and star player Luka Doncic have a "great relationship" despite a heated exchange between the pair that went viral.
articles.title: NBA: Los Angeles Lakers coach JJ Redick says he and Luka Doncic have 'great relationship' after viral exchange
